title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Kozhikode - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Kozhikode - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Kozhikode. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About IIM Kozhikode:
IIM Kozhikode is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode!
